blobClientMock
    .Setup(blob => blob.DownloadToAsync(It.IsAny<Stream>(), It.IsAny<CancellationToken>()))
    .Callback<Stream, CancellationToken>((stream, cancellationToken) =>
    {
        byte[] bytes = System.Text.Encoding.ASCII.GetBytes(blobContent);
        stream.Write(bytes, 0, bytes.Length);
        stream.Position = 0;
    })
    .ReturnsAsync((Azure.Response<Azure.Storage.Blobs.Models.BlobProperties>)null!);
